title: Your AI Agent Is Missing Half the Internet… Until Now (Agent-Reach)
summary: Agent-Reach is an open source tool that enables AI agents to access real-time internet context across Western and Chinese platforms including Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu. It allows coding agents to retrieve discussions, social feedback, tutorials, GitHub issues, video comments, and non-English research from the internet in a single command.
writeup: The video covers Agent-Reach, an open source tool that lets AI agents pull real-time internet context across both Western and Chinese platforms, including Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu. It addresses a gap in coding agents that typically lack access to live discussions, social feedback, and non-English sources. The key takeaway is that a single command retrieves discussions, tutorials, GitHub issues, video comments, and non-English research, widening the range of context available to agents.
